title: 有馬記念の後に・からっぽ

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: While I was running, my mind went blank.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: There was no room for thoughts. I just... ran.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I ran and ran with all my heart, and maybe that's
why...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
As if to make up for everything I've had to deal
with—the split toenails and all that other
crap—for once in my life, things actually went my
way.

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
First place is Tosen Jordan! Tosen Jordan wins in
a huge upset!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... I... I...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
An incredible performance. Your timing on the
final rally—I suspect that was the result of careful
analysis leading up to today?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Pant... Uh... I... I just... like...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Apologies. Don't push yourself to speak now. You
put everything you had into the race.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Seeing you in front of me was such a surprise. I
never would've thought to position like that.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It felt like you could see the path you were meant
to take. Had you predicted how the pack would
form around the third corner?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Umm... How the what now?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought so too! I can't believe you read the race
so well...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (What the heck are they talking about?)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You really got me thinking about how to best close out a race. Sigh... I must review my performance when I get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I too must learn to be more aggressive in
getting out front... I've realized I need to take
every advantage I can.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Uh... Right...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (What are they saying? I'm so lost...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
But first, congratulations are in order. You're the
one who claimed victory in this race for
supremacy.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I won't make the same mistakes next time. I'll come prepared with a proper strategy.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't lose next time. Next time...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely beat you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: What was that?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: They're all like aliens.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text: Jordan! What an incredible race!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... sure.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
The race seemed to pan out exactly how you
wanted it to! Did you have it all worked out from
the start?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Um, well...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No? I mean, I wasn't really thinking about
anything...

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
I see. So you don't want to reveal any secrets just
yet. Looks like everyone else will need to come
up with new strategies!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I won't lose next time. Next time...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'll definitely beat you.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
No one had their eyes on me before, but next
time they might see me as like... a rival, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Hah, guess I really lucked out today.

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
You're among the strongest competitors now! I
can't wait to see what you have in store for us in
your future races!

text_block_list.name: Announcer
text_block_list.text:
Next year's G1 season will see you as the
favorite, no doubt! We might even see you sweep
it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh... Okay...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(Hold on. I really just got lucky today... I really
don't know what's gonna happen next...)

text_block_list.name: Gyarus
text_block_list.text: Duh! Jordan is on fire! Every G1 is gonna be hers!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (...Oh god.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (If I lose next time, it's going to be cringe city.)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
There's this clip I watched I don't know how many
times leading up to today.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I knew it would be tough, but I could hear Helios's
voice, telling me to be explosive until the end!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and also! I was really hoping the pace would
be slow and, sure enough, it was! I think that's
part of why I won too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
After the last Arima, Palmer really sounded like
she knew what she was talking about.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
I thought for a second that maybe I could say
something like that when I finished the Arima.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But I had no idea what to say.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
It felt like you could see the path you were meant
to take. Had you predicted how the pack would
form around the third corner?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I don't know.)

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I thought so too! I can't believe you read the race
so well...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: (I don't know, I really don't know.)

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: You really got me thinking about how to best close out a race. Sigh... I must review my performance when I get back.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Yes, I too must learn to be more aggressive in
getting out front... I've realized I need to take
every advantage I can.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
(I don't know, I don't know. I dunno, I dunno, I
dunno!)

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: I mean, how could I understand? I'm too dumb.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: That kind of thing is just... beyond me.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, sorry. What were we talking about?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh. Right.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tosen Jordan did incredible in the Arima Kinen.
Keeping her previous goal of making it big in
mind...
choice_data_list: How about we aim for the Osaka Hai next?
How about we aim for the Osaka Hai next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the first leg of the Senior Spring Triple Crown,
and it's 2,000 meters long, Jordan's specialty.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, she's been reading up on different races
and making her own goals. So if she has
something else in mind, we can focus on that.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, about that...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Do I have to decide on a goal? Right now, I just,
you know...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Think maybe this is, like, enough. Like I don't
need any more, you know?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
So, um... see ya. Good night and... farewell! Er,
anyway, gotta go!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: ...Maybe if I go to training, I'll know what's "next."

text_block_list.name: Gyaru A
text_block_list.text:
Jordan! About the party... How about instead of
just grabbing food, we go on a mini trip instead?

text_block_list.name: Gyaru B
text_block_list.text:
My mom said she'd drive us! She said we should
really relax and enjoy our time off.

text_block_list.name: Gyaru C
text_block_list.text:
Uh, Jordan? I guess you must be beat after today,
huh? Wanna talk about it tomorrow?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Oh, um... yeah, no, that sounds good.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Totally down. See you later, then. Night night. ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After the Arima Kinen, I put together a regimen
for the rest of the year to prepare her for the
Osaka Hai and other G1's, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She never shows up to training.
